tracks.meaning: a word or set of words by which a person, thing, or place is known, spoken of, or identified
a company, product, or brand known by a particular title in the marketplace
the legal identity or title under which a person or entity operates or is registered
to give a title or designation to someone or something
to identify or specify something with precision or authority
fame or reputation in society or public consciousness
a symbolic identifier or label used to reference a variable, function, file, or other digital entity
